---
title: "models.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/games/odin_protocol/engine/models.py"
loc: 111
complexity: 2
logic_score: 3.97
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 8.61
overall_score: 6.28
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating Chromosome, to_dict. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [time](file://time)
- [dataclasses](file://dataclasses)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `Chromosome`
- `to_dict`
- `from_dict`
- `Item`
- `to_dict`
- `from_dict`
- `UniverseState`
- `to_dict`
- `from_dict`
